name: Pueblo Green Chile Stew
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Green chiles - roasted and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the stew meat with water in a large pan. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 4 hours.
2. Add chopped green chiles, salt, and garlic powder.
3. Mix the blue corn meal in a little cold water and stir rapidly. When the mixture has thickened, continue simmering for about 45 minutes.
(Note: Recipe by Best from New Mexico Kitchens)
